description: Legal document (draft) in the hand of Hillel b. ʿEli (fl. 1066–1108 CE). Describing the terms of the business partnership between Abū Yaʿqūb Yequtiʾel (b. Moshe) and Yosef b. David al-Lebdī. Commodities include a bale of lichen (עדל אשנה) and 75 of something else. Mentions someone titled Sar ha-Qehilot (שר הקהלות). Belongs together with India Book I,1–15. (Information in part from CUDL.) ASE
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית מהמאה ה-11. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
